title: Tenant/Workspace API/Audit/Regression Completion
context: GL-200C closes the API boundary, audit propagation, and regression gaps identified after GL-200B. It is not a production SaaS readiness gate.
scope: Server routes for grant-executions: tenant context from auth
Demo action: tenant_id propagation to audit events and executions
expire_old_requests(): tenant_id propagation to expiry audit events

grant_execution_tenant_isolation.description: grant_executions.py did not use tenant_id column added by migration 0010; server routes did not pass tenant_id

demo_action_tenant_propagation.description: handle_demo_action() called list_grants() without tenant_id, created audit events without tenant_id

expire_old_requests_audit_propagation.description: expire_old_requests() created expiry audit events without tenant_id from the request being expired

evidence_provenance_auditor_secondary_pa.description: Secondary evidence/provenance/auditor paths do not enforce tenant; deferred since execution IDs are now tenant-scoped

agent_permissions_stateless.description: Agent permission evaluators are stateless; no DB access; not a cross-tenant leak vector

openapi_contract_alignment.reason: Tenant context is implicit from authentication; no user-supplied tenant parameters. Existing auth description remains accurate. Full contract update deferred to GL-201+.

migration_schema_assessment.reason: Migration 0010 (GL-200B) already added tenant_id/workspace_id to grant_executions. GL-200C fixes the application layer only; no new migration needed.

remaining_gaps: Full OpenAPI contract update for tenant context documentation
production_readiness_impact: GL-200C strengthens the implementation baseline; does not change production readiness status. GrantLayer remains Developer Preview / Controlled Preview with strict boundaries.
decision_rationale: All concrete GL-200B gaps identified are fixed. No new real functional regressions. Regression matrix passes. Safety confirmations met.
recommended_next_issues: GL-200C Merge — merge to internal main
GL-201 — Production Auth / Secrets / Config Hardening
